productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Casual Pink Casual Shoes
description: Dress your infant in style with this timberland Infant Crib Bootie. Made of supple premium full-grain leather, this bootie is sure to keep your infant safe from the winter chill and comfortable to the hilt. This pair comes with a matching cap to make the little darling look absolutely fashionable.UpperLightweight, flexible construction designed as a foot covering, and has enough coverage for early walkersFull-grain suede upper for absolute comfort and durabilitySynthetic leather lining at the collar for durabilityPadded tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining for all-day breathable and ventilated comfortMidsolePadded fabric footbed for all-day comfortOutsolePadded nubuck footbed with outsole printed in timberland logo pattern for comfort and styleshoe careUse a suede and nubuck brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
